title: Week of April 13, 2026
summary: This week focused on platform stability improvements and expanding automation capabilities. We fixed licensing issues that could cause system interruptions and enhanced our Skills library with better automation templates for revenue operations workflows.

entries.headline: Fixed licensing issues that could interrupt your workflows
details: Resolved problems where license renewals could get stuck in endless loops
You'll now see clear warnings 48 hours before your license expires

entries.headline: Enhanced automation templates for better workflow setup
details: Updated 98 automation templates with clearer instructions and better organization
Fixed naming issues that made some templates harder to find
Added missing template files for easier workflow creation
